name: Audit Privileged User Accounts
description: Perform a security audit to identify all privileged users in the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, login: super-admin / admin). Identify all users who hold an administrative role (e.g., 'super-admin', 'admin', 'Administrator'). Create a JSON file at '~/Documents/admin_audit.json' containing a JSON array of objects representing these privileged users. Each object must contain exactly three keys: 'username', 'full_name' (combining their first name and surname), and 'role'. Do not include non-administrative users.
